title: Emoji width correction assumption may not hold on newer Safari
body: measurement.ts assumes Safari canvas and DOM emoji widths always agree so correction is 0 there, but on recent iOS Safari versions we're seeing a small but consistent mismatch for multi-codepoint emoji sequences, causing line breaks in the wrong place.

title: computeBidiLevels may mis-handle surrogate pairs at segment boundaries
body: computeBidiLevels walks the string by UTF-16 code units and tracks codeUnitLength for surrogate pairs, but when a surrogate pair falls right at a prepared segment boundary from prepareWithSegments(), the bidi level array seems to end up misaligned with the segment's character offsets.

title: layout() re-measures cached word widths after a locale change
body: prepare() caches word widths keyed on the analyzed text run, but calling setAnalysisLocale afterwards doesn't appear to invalidate previously cached widths for text that behaves differently under the new locale (e.g. Thai word segmentation), so layout() uses stale measurements.

title: corpus-sweep.ts hardcodes the corpora directory
body: scripts/corpus-sweep.ts always reads from the bundled corpora/ folder. It would be useful to pass a custom corpus directory so we can sweep against our own multilingual text samples without copying them into the repo.

title: benchmark page doesn't report which navigation phase regressed
body: pages/benchmark.ts calls publishNavigationPhase/publishNavigationReport but the resulting report only shows an aggregate score, making it hard to tell whether a regression came from prepare(), layout(), or the rich-inline path.
